variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHHP40360 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon R961Z0815A
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHHP40360 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon R961Z0815A
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHHP40360 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Fairey Arlon R961Z0815A. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHHP40360 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MICROFIT® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MICROFIT® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 12µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 78.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 43.0 mm, Length: 210.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 210 bar, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 210 BAR, Seal: Viton

variants.title: Donaldson P167186 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Fairey Arlon R961Z0815A
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P167186 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Fairey Arlon R961Z0815A
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P167186 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge is designed to provide superior protection for your hydraulic system, effectively capturing contaminants to ensure clean fluid circulation. With high-quality filtration media, it extends equipment life, improves operational efficiency, and maintains fluid cleanliness even in the most demanding environments. Built for industrial, agricultural, and heavy-duty applications, this filter offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and flow efficiency. Its easy installation and maintenance help reduce downtime, making it a reliable choice for keeping hydraulic systems running smoothly.
